'''lathusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebeck|zebeck]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebeck|zebeck]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lathusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læthisith|læthisith]] || [[word:læthisij|læthisij]] || [[word:læthisish|læthisish]] || [[word:læthisi|læthisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lathuthusuth|lathuthusuth]] || [[word:lathuthusuj|lathuthusuj]] || [[word:lathuthusush|lathuthusush]] || [[word:lathuthusu|lathuthusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lathusuth|lathusuth]] || [[word:lathusuj|lathusuj]] || [[word:lathusush|lathusush]] || [[word:lathusu|lathusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lathufsuth|lathufsuth]] || [[word:lathufsuj|lathufsuj]] || [[word:lathufsush|lathufsush]] || [[word:lathufsuf|lathufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lathusuthu|lathusuthu]] || [[word:lathusuju|lathusuju]] || [[word:lathusushu|lathusushu]] || [[word:lathusuku|lathusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lathusuth|lathusuth]] || [[word:lathusuj|lathusuj]] || [[word:lathusush|lathusush]] || [[word:lathusu|lathusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lathusuthul|lathusuthul]] || [[word:lathusujul|lathusujul]] || [[word:lathusushul|lathusushul]] || [[word:lathusukul|lathusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lathusuthuthu|lathusuthuthu]] || [[word:lathusujuju|lathusujuju]] || [[word:lathusushushu|lathusushushu]] || [[word:lathusuku|lathusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lathusuthun|lathusuthun]] || [[word:lathusujun|lathusujun]] || [[word:lathusushun|lathusushun]] || [[word:lathusukun|lathusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lathusuthuoro|lathusuthuoro]] || [[word:lathusujuoro|lathusujuoro]] || [[word:lathusushuoro|lathusushuoro]] || [[word:lathusukuoro|lathusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
